description: Case Style: Stainless steel circular case with digital display, 4 screw studs around the dialStrap Style: Black strap with grooved detailing and  a tang closureFeatures: Digital display, date display, light to view in low light situations, stopwatch, mode button to activate different modes, four press buttons to adjust settings, 2 buttons at the sidesWater resistant: 30 mWarranty: 1 year
